'''LIN-D2D''' was a [[LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer/Legends|LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] for sale at [[Jawa Traders]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. Like many LIN droids, she was reprogrammed to serve beyond her original purpose as a minelayer. She was a data recorder for legal cases, and also a mobile entertainment system in a shipboard casino. She was then used as a forward military observer during unauthorized experiments, and made capable of linking up with common [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]]. Though she was to be [[Memory wipe/Legends|memory wiped]] after this, due to the sudden ending of the experiments this was neglected. She is reticent to reveal this aspect of her programming, preferring to emphasize her work as an [[Entertainment droid/Legends|entertainment droid]].<ref name="GG7" />
